module.name: Hospitality and Customer Service
module.description: Core hospitality operations, customer attention, and service delivery.

learningOutcomes.description: Organises hospitality service operations according to the module plan.

assessmentCriteria.description: Identifies the phases of the hospitality service workflow.
Selects the appropriate resources for each service activity.

learningOutcomes.description: Applies customer service standards in realistic hospitality scenarios.

assessmentCriteria.description: Communicates with clients using the expected professional tone.
Resolves routine customer incidents following protocol.

contentUnits.title: Service workflow foundations
contentUnits.description: Operational stages, service preparation, and coordination.

contentUnits.title: Customer care and incident handling
contentUnits.description: Communication standards, complaint handling, and service recovery.
